info.name: Private API - Laravel Sanctum
info.description: Dokumentasi lengkap API Private dengan Laravel Sanctum. Semua request body yang menerima input menggunakan form-data (termasuk upload file logo pada Shops). Token login otomatis tersimpan ke variable `{{auth_token}}`.

item.name: Authentication
item.description: Endpoint autentikasi user: register, login, profile, dan logout.

request.description: Register user baru. Return data user + token.

response.name: Validation Error

request.description: Login user. Token otomatis disimpan ke variable `{{auth_token}}`.
Ambil data user yang sedang login. Wajib Bearer token.
Hapus token aktif. User harus login ulang.

response.name: Validation Error

request.description: Update data user. Semua field optional kecuali yang dikirim.
Update data produk. Semua field optional kecuali yang dikirim.
Tampilkan semua staff pada toko tertentu.
Tambah staff ke toko. Role: owner/staff.
Tampilkan detail kategori produk beserta list produk di dalamnya.

item.name: Shops
item.description: CRUD toko. Upload logo menggunakan form-data file. Status: 0=inactive, 1=active, 2=pending.

response.name: Success
response.body:
{
  "success": true,
  "data": [
    {
      "id": 1,
      "logo": "logos/example.jpg",
      "name": "My Shop",
      "slug": "my-shop",
      "address": "Jl. Example No. 1",
      "phone_number": "08123456789",
      "email": "shop@example.com",
      "description": "Best shop in town",
      "status": 1,
      "created_at": "2024-01-15T10:00:00.000000Z",
      "updated_at": "2024-01-15T10:00:00.000000Z"
    }
  ]
}

request.description: Buat toko baru. Logo optional (jpeg, png, jpg, gif, svg max 2MB). Otomatis menambahkan owner dari user yang login.

response.name: Success
response.body:
{
  "success": true,
  "data": {
    "id": 1,
    "logo": "logos/example.jpg",
    "name": "My Shop",
    "slug": "my-shop",
    "address": "Jl. Example No. 1",
    "phone_number": "08123456789",
    "email": "shop@example.com",
    "description": "Best shop in town",
    "status": 1,
    "created_at": "2024-01-15T10:00:00.000000Z",
    "updated_at": "2024-01-15T10:00:00.000000Z"
  }
}

response.name: Validation Error

request.description: Tampilkan detail toko beserta list produk di dalamnya.

response.name: Success
response.body:
{
  "success": true,
  "data": {
    "id": 1,
    "logo": "logos/example.jpg",
    "name": "My Shop",
    "slug": "my-shop",
    "address": "Jl. Example No. 1",
    "phone_number": "08123456789",
    "email": ", "description": "Best shop in town",
    "status": 1,
    "products": [],
    "created_at": "2024-01-15T10:00:00.000000Z",
    "updated_at": "2024-01-15T10:00:00.000000Z"
  }
}

request.description: Update data toko. Semua field optional kecuali yang dikirim.

response.name: Success
response.body:
{
  "success": true,
  "data": {
    "id": 1,
    "logo": "logos/new-logo.png",
    "name": "My Shop Updated",
    "slug": "my-shop-updated",
    "address": "Jl. Updated No. 2",
    "phone_number": "08987654321",
    "email": ","description": "Updated description",
    "status": 1,
    "created_at": "2024-01-15T10:00:00.000000Z",
    "updated_at": "2024-01-15T10:00:00.000000Z"
  }
}

response.name: Validation Error

request.description: Hapus toko beserta semua produk dan relasi lainnya.
